meta.description: Ghadeer Al-Rawa Water Desalination — design, execution and maintenance of water treatment and desalination systems for homes and commercial and industrial facilities in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

hero.title: Pure, safe water starts here
hero.subtitle: Specialists in the design, execution and maintenance of water treatment and desalination systems for homes and commercial and industrial facilities — highest quality standards and the best global components.

about.title: Engineering expertise for water
about.lead: A company specialized in the design, execution and maintenance of water treatment and desalination systems.
about.body: Ghadeer Al-Rawa Water Desalination is a company specialized in the design, execution and maintenance of water treatment and desalination systems. We deliver integrated solutions for homes and commercial and industrial facilities, committed to the highest quality standards and using the best global components to ensure pure, safe water.
about.vision: To be among the leading companies in water treatment and desalination in Saudi Arabia, by delivering innovative and sustainable solutions.
about.mission: To provide safe, pure water through reliable engineering solutions, committed to quality and customer service.

whyUs.title: Why choose Ghadeer Al-Rawa?
whyUs.lead: Reasons that make us the trusted choice for water solutions.

items.title: Specialized technical expertise
items.desc: An experienced engineering team in water treatment and desalination systems.

items.title: Solutions based on water analysis
items.desc: Every system is designed from a precise analysis of the water source.

items.title: High-quality equipment
items.desc: We rely on the best global components for performance and longevity.

items.title: Workmanship warranty
items.desc: We guarantee execution quality and your peace of mind after installation.

items.title: After-sales service
items.desc: Regular follow-up and maintenance keep your system efficient.

items.title: Fast execution
items.desc: On-time commitment and professional delivery without delays.

items.title: Technical support & consulting
items.desc: We guide you with engineering advice from idea to operation.

services.title: Integrated water treatment services
services.lead: From home filters to industrial and sea-water desalination stations.

items.title: Home water filter installation
items.desc: Professional installation of home water filters of all types.

items.title: Maintenance of all water filters
items.desc: Scheduled and emergency maintenance for every filter type.

items.title: Industrial RO station design & execution
items.desc: Industrial reverse-osmosis stations at capacities tailored to need.

items.title: Sea-water desalination stations
items.desc: High-efficiency Sea Water RO systems to desalinate seawater.

items.title: Pre-treatment systems
items.desc: Sand, carbon filters and softeners to protect and extend the system.

items.title: Iron, manganese, sulfur & silica removal
items.desc: Specialized systems to remove elements and impurities from water.

items.title: UV sterilization systems
items.desc: Safe UV water sterilization with no chemicals.

items.title: Chlorine & chemical dosing systems
items.desc: Precise chlorine and chemical dosing per treatment requirements.

items.title: CIP membrane cleaning systems
items.desc: Clean-in-place (CIP) systems to maintain membrane efficiency.

items.title: Spare parts, pumps & membranes supply
items.desc: Supply of genuine, high-quality spare parts, pumps and membranes.

items.title: Periodic maintenance contracts
items.desc: Maintenance contracts that keep your system running efficiently.

products.title: Reliable products & solutions
products.lead: A complete range of water treatment and desalination systems and components.

sectors.title: Sectors we serve
sectors.lead: Water solutions designed for every sector's needs.

workStages.title: Our work stages
workStages.lead: A clear methodology from analysis to maintenance.

items.title: Water analysis
items.desc: Precise testing of the water source to define the right solution.

items.title: Client needs study
items.desc: Understanding your requirements, consumption and purpose.

items.title: System design
items.desc: Custom engineering design matched to the water and need.

items.title: Supply & installation
items.desc: Supplying components and installing them professionally.

items.title: Commissioning & testing
items.desc: Running the system and testing the resulting water quality.

items.title: Follow-up & maintenance
items.desc: Regular follow-up and maintenance to sustain performance.

footer.about: A company specialized in the design, execution and maintenance of water treatment and desalination systems for homes and commercial and industrial facilities in Saudi Arabia.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: At Ghadeer Al-Rawa we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect when you use our website, and how we use and safeguard it.
privacy.contactBody: For any question about your privacy, or to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data, you can reach us at:

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body: When you contact us or request a quote, we may collect the information you provide yourself, such as your name, phone number, email address and the details of your request. We may also automatically collect basic technical data such as your browser type, device and the pages you visit, to improve your experience.

sections.heading: How we use your data
sections.body: We use your data to respond to your enquiries, provide quotes and deliver the requested services, and to improve our website and services and communicate with you about your request. We do not use your data for any other purpose without your consent.

sections.heading: Sharing your data
sections.body: We do not sell or rent your data to any third party. We may only share it with trusted service providers who help us run our business, or when required by an official authority under the laws of Saudi Arabia.

sections.heading: Data protection & retention
sections.body: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access or use. We keep it only for as long as needed to provide the service or as required by law, and then dispose of it securely.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: Our website may use essential cookies to ensure it works correctly and to remember your preferences such as language and dark mode. You can set your browser to refuse these cookies without significantly affecting your browsing of the site.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data at any time. To do so, contact us using the details shown below and we will respond to your request as soon as possible.
